title: Absinthe: execute operation exception
description: A GraphQL operation via Absinthe raised an exception. Same fields as absinthe.execute.operation.stop.

operation_name.description: Named operation from the GraphQL query, if present.

selections.description: Top-level field names selected in the operation.

errors.description: GraphQL errors returned in the result, if any.

duration.description: Duration in microseconds before the exception was raised.

request_id.description: Request ID from the current EventContext.
